name: Windows utilities · Info+ CLI (multi_scripts_lib/work)
description: PyInstaller-oriented CLI utility under multi_scripts_lib/work/Info+_CLI—reproducible Windows builds, version metadata embedded, and supply-chain-aware distribution guidance.
longDescription: CLI utility within the `multi_scripts_lib` monorepo (`work/Info+_CLI`), built with PyInstaller (`--onefile`, icon, version resources) around `runScriptDecode.py`. The packaging recipe favours deterministic build flags and traceable version resources so operators can verify what they ship. Presented here as its own entry alongside other `work/` utilities rather than as the whole monorepo. Implementation lives under the monorepo’s `work` folder in source control.
features: One-file executable packaging recipe with documented PyInstaller flags
Version resource and icon embedding for traceability and installer hygiene
Isolated subtree inside multi_scripts_lib/work—clear module boundary
Build reproducibility mindset: minimise implicit environment dependencies
highlights: Shipping Windows-friendly CLI binaries with embedded version metadata
Clear monorepo path for discoverability and ownership of dependencies
Security: code signing and secret-free frozen bundles for external distribution
challenges: Small monorepo slices often ship with minimal documentation.
solutions: Describe capabilities that match the code and build instructions; the source link points to the exact subtree.
security: Sign binaries when distributing outside internal networks
Avoid embedding secrets inside frozen executables
